reviews.comment:
Nos atendieron muy bien. Nos dieron buenas indicaciones del lugar adonde necesitábamos llegar. Buenos baños bien. El comedor estaba cerrado en al mediodía. Fuimos en Mayo

(Translated by Google)
We received excellent service. They gave us good directions to where we needed to go. The restrooms were good. The dining room was closed at midday. We went in May.

reviews.comment:
24 de mayo. 13 hs. Venimos viajando y nos encontramos con un gordo maleducado. Luego daban vueltas para atendernos...
Se jactaba que entramos al revés en la playa. Y con cero modales retandonos . Un maleducado!

(Translated by Google)
May 24th, 1 PM. We were traveling when we encountered a rude, overweight man. They kept giving us the runaround... He was bragging that we entered the beach backwards. And he was completely rude, scolding us. What a jerk!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQybzZyTlZBEAE

reviews.comment:

Me gusta

I like
